title: Code Patching Safety Invariants
purpose: Prevent silent patch failure, regex-only structural code mutation, and false success claims during governed code modification.
applies_to: any code-modifying command in the sandbox
forbidden_patterns: assuming function signatures such as def main(): without inspection
patching multiple files from broad keyword scans without allowlist

root_cause_closed.example_failure: Regex/string replacement looked for def main(): but target used def main() -> int:, causing no mutation while script claimed success.
root_cause_closed.permanent_fix: All code patches must verify structural match count and post-write marker presence before any success claim.
